use_cases: Search bar with typewriter-animated suggestion text for engaging user experience
Command palette or quick-search with slide/fade suggestion effects
Hero section search input with cycling animated suggestions
Auto-complete search component with customizable animation effects
Accessible search input supporting reduced motion preferences
ai_summary: A search input component featuring animated text suggestions with built-in typewriter, slide, fade, and custom effect support. Supports infinite or one-time animation modes, custom leading/trailing icons, and respects reduced motion preferences. Highly customizable via EffectComponent prop for extensibility.
